title: Korean Cheese Sweet Pancakes
description: A sweet and savory pancake recipe that combines the flavors of Korea with melted cheese. This recipe is perfect for a dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: velvety milk
ingredients.notes: dairy milk or non-dairy milk alternative

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the sweet flour and velvety milk until smooth.
Add the korean chili flakes, if using, and stir to combine.
Heat the stir-fry oil in a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle shredded cheese on top of the pancake.
Fold the pancake in half to enclose the cheese.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the pancake is golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the pancakes are cooked.
